title: selaginella buchholzii
intro: Selaginella buchholzii, also known as the African spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella buchholzii include its ability to reduce fever, relieve coughs, and alleviate respiratory issues, as well as its potential to protect against certain types of infections. Selaginella buchholzii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and has been traditionally used in various cultures, although its use and effectiveness may vary depending on the preparation method and individual results.
